headline: Chief Marketing Officer
summary: I am a strategic marketing and insights leader specialising in translating data and…
location_str: City of Johannesburg, Gauteng, South Africa

experiences.title: Head of Group Marketing and Services
Group Head: Marketing Services
experiences.description:
Build and Manage the Marketing Strategy: Lead the development, communication and implementation of marketing and brand strategies and activities.

Brand Management: Lead innovation across portfolios and channels to develop and improve brand identity and positioning ensuring there is a consistent & strong image across all initiatives.

Advertising: overseeing both the above the line and below the lines campaigns.

Communication Strategy: Owns the Communication Strategy and overseas all Digital, Creative, PR and 
Media, ensuring that key Media, Brand and PR strategies are delivered throughout the year to improve presence in the market including management of media share of voice.

Event Management: lead corporate events and workshops by providing on-brand staging ideas and developing world class collateral.

Collateral management: overseas the appearance of all organisation print and electronic materials and manage apparel.

Research, Analysis & Reporting: Direct research, analysis & monitoring of competitor positioning and market intelligence, consumer and audience insights and potential markets to develop strategies around brand positioning and product features positioning. Identify Market Research requirements and ensure key insights from research are actioned.

Content Development and Management: Develop the content strategy and calendar to enhance brand reputation and expert positioning within the market in line with the business strategy. This includes leading the development and execution of marketing content for online and off-line channels.

Cost & Investment Management: Responsible budgeting, revising forecasts within the Division. 
Contributes to management/ board reports on the overall status and progress of the marketing and research function.

Leadership & Team Management: Planning and leadership of marketing department ensuring appropriate structures, process, resources, alongside succession planning and talent development.

experiences.title: Group Research and Insights Manager
experiences.description:
Lead the centralised Analytics & Insights function for Provantage Media Group, responsible for providing critical business insights, marketing services, inform strategic operations and drive key business decisions including:
1. Define, develop and implement a world class analytics strategy and capability to create a data and insights driven organisation and culture where insights are embedded into strategic projects, business initiatives and client experiences throughout the business.
2. Provide marketing services function through partnering with marketing and sales teams to strategically merchandise Provantage products and capabilities, produce on-brand tools and resources for use by sales to grow revenues and achieve business objectives.
3. Leverage primary research, proprietary data and data partnerships (e.g. Tap Tap) to offer business support that guides client advertising solutions, businesses cases and innovation strategies for clients and business

experiences.title: Industry Lead: Retail & Finance
experiences.description: I am responsible for leading and guiding strategic initiatives a long with new analytical and research methodological projects. Furthermore, I am responsible for leading modernisation of current benchmark products, including service experience and brand benchmarks. I am also responsible for growing insights capabilities with a focus on retail and finance industries to best practice and modern marketing frameworks and methodologies that drive insightful recommendations for clients. I also lead key strategic accounts and research projects, including syndicated research projects, brand trackers and customer satisfaction measurements.

experiences.title: Executive: Billion Voices
experiences.description: In my current role I am responsible for leading innovative product development including conceptualisation, development, commercialisation and marketing of current and new analytical and methodological initiatives. I am responsible for leading new analytical and research methodological initiatives. Furthermore I am responsible for modernisation of current benchmark products, including service experience and brand benchmarks. I am also responsible for growing insights capabilities through formal and informal training and mentoring to ensure that best practice and modern marketing frameworks and methodologies that drive insightful recommendations for clients. Furthermore, I am also involved in key research projects, including syndicated brand measurements and customer satisfaction measurements.

experiences.title: Marketing Intelligence Manager
experiences.description:
Provide marketing content driven by quantitative and qualitative data analysis, metrics, insights and business indicators in a timely manner at highest quality and accuracy levels to marketing and marketing services in support of marketing and business strategy, product and market intelligence.
Research and Market Insights
•	Data analysis and insights: Synthesize data from multiple sources to develop recommendations for client objectives and strategies.
•	Research project and programme management: Manage design and implementation of research studies, analysis, and internal support of primary and secondary research and marketing insights.
Marketing Planning, Strategy & Execution	
•	Marketing strategy and tactics: Develops, implements and supports marketing strategy and tactics through intelligent content creation for external communications and marketing material.
•	Competitive intelligence: Synthesizes and leverages information on the ongoing competitive landscape to identify opportunities to adjust and optimise the Marketing Plan.
•	Sales engagement: Equips the sales force with the knowledge and tools they need to communicate product value and effectively execute sales strategies.
•	Pricing objectives and strategy: Synthesizes data and provides recommendations for the development of the pricing objectives and strategies.
Digital Marketing
•	Digital strategy and planning: Developing, implementing and supporting digital marketing communication activities.
•	Digital content creation: Develop copy write and guide creative development for digital marketing activities.
•	Management of digital channels: Strategically plan, manage and execute measurable, integrated digital marketing to increase market engagement and reputational management of the Primedia Outdoor brand.
•	Digital reputational management: Act as liaison between the company, creative and PR agencies.
Budget Management
•	Prepare and manage the annual budget for the Marketing Services Department

experiences.title: Senior Market Intelligence Analyst
experiences.description:
My current role focuses on driving and managing continuous and ad hoc research projects, including qualitative and quantitative data analysis and the delivery of integrated and actionable insights. Further responsibilities include: 
• Integrate broader audience knowledge from a variety of custom and syndicated sources to help formulate client-specific category/out of home media strategies and plans.
• Leads the discovery and articulation of insights, and the business opportunities derived from them, and ensures learning share cross-functionally across the business.
• Aggregate all market and audience intelligence information into an audience value story; publish external material as appropriate for the market to demonstrate leadership and expertise in the out of home advertising space.
• Gathering, interpreting, analysing and disseminating market intelligence to support sales function in addressing clients’ outdoor media objectives and needs.
• Support development and operations by providing value added research insights, recommendations and strategic input derived from market and business intelligence.

experiences.company: University of South Africa/Universiteit van Suid-Afrika
experiences.title: Researcher and Assistant Lecturer
experiences.description:
• Manage full research process, including research design, questionnaire design, sample management, data analysis and compilation of findings.
• Compilation of study guides and tutorial letters as well of examination and moderation of assignments and examinations.
• Review journal articles to ensure that articles adhere to academic and research.

experiences.title: Research Executive
experiences.description:
• Responsible for coordinating research projects without day-to-day supervision, including all aspects of project delivery, team management, handling relevant client communications and general queries.
• Interpret marketing information/consumer trends and provide clients with the necessary insight and expertise required to make informed decisions regarding their brands.

experiences.title: Key Accounts Manager
experiences.description: This role included partnering with brand and media owners to translate their business needs into actionable business and research questions in order to derive strategic insights and recommendations into their current and potential consumers and identifying opportunities for clients in the market place. This includes comprehensive target market overviews and consumer profiles to identify behaviours and needs of consumers, competitor analysis, market segmentation and media reports which are produced to various clients stakeholders such as marketing services, brand planners and managers as well as sales and product design teams.

education.school: GIBS Business School (Gordon Institute of Business Science)

accomplishment_publications.name: Language Choices in Higher Education: The Case of Black and Afrikaans-speaking White Students at the University of South Africa (Unisa)
Book Review: Rykie, n Lewe met Woorde
accomplishment_publications.description: Journalism professor Lizette Rabe of Stellenbosch University takes on the big challenge of documenting the life of the ‘legendary’ Afrikaans female journalist Rykie Van Reenen. In her book, Rabe argues that despite Van Reenen’s private nature, it is necessary to appreciate the journalistic contributions of this ground-breaking female South African journalist and renowned Afrikaans writer of the second half of the twentieth century. The book reminds us of the patriarchal oppression South African women experienced and how Van Reenen overcame male dominance, especially in the field of journalism.
